hypothesis: Incorporating MOF synthesis condition data (e.g., solvent type, temperature, reaction time, and precursor concentrations) extracted from the PMC Open Access literature as an additional continual pre-training corpus will enable the LLM to learn implicit structure-synthesis-property relationships, such that fine-tuning on a dataset of fewer than 1,000 labeled MOF samples will yield lower MAE on band gap prediction than the current PMC+PubChem pre-trained model fine-tuned on 5,226 samples.
